card.headline: Overall adherence is strong, but exercise challenge is mismatched: Blobs looks too easy while Twister remains very low performing.
reasons: Blobs performance stays high (0.87–0.98) while difficulty stays ~0.14, suggesting it may be under-challenging.
Twister performance remains very low (0.00–0.21) at minimal difficulty (0.00–0.02), suggesting a protocol plateau.

params.text: Twister scores look consistently near zero despite very low difficulty. Any setup/understanding issues or specific movements that are hard?
Blobs looks consistently very successful. If you have a higher difficulty option available and it is comfortable, consider progressing it per your therapist’s plan.

items.text: Blobs performance stays high (0.87–0.98) while difficulty stays ~0.14, suggesting it may be under-challenging.
Twister performance remains very low (0.00–0.21) at minimal difficulty (0.00–0.02), suggesting a protocol plateau.

checkin.wins: You kept a steady rhythm and finished strong on Sunday with a bigger session. Hockey AR and Whacamole AR looked more controlled by the end of the week.
checkin.to_improve: If you can, sprinkle in a short Twister round on quieter days to keep that skill warmed up.
